q1.question: How are private practice and salon work combined?
q1.answer: All appointments, whether booked as private practice or at a salon, appear in the unified professional dashboard. This allows effective time and client base management.

q2.question: Can I receive invitations from salons?
q2.answer: Yes, registered professionals can receive invitations from salons and venues through the platform. All invitations will be displayed in your dashboard.

q3.question: What data is available in the dashboard?
q3.answer: The professional dashboard contains information about appointments, clients, offered services, work schedule and notifications. You can also set up a public page to attract new clients.

q4.question: Can self-employed individuals use the dashboard?
q4.answer: Yes, the professional dashboard is suitable for both salon employees and self-employed professionals. All features are adapted for effective business management.

q5.question: How is data confidentiality ensured?
q5.answer: We maintain a strict privacy policy and use modern information protection methods to ensure the security of your data.

q6.question: Is there a mobile app?
q6.answer: The professional dashboard is fully adapted for mobile devices, allowing you to manage your business from anywhere.
